name: Gassal Simulation
short_description: Gassal Simulation is a simulation game that presents the process of washing, shrouding,and burying the deceased with realistic mechanics and physics-based interactions.Play solo and complete tasks in environments such as the washing area and cemetery while experiencing this profound spiritual journe
detailed_description:
1. Geniş Tanıtım Metni:

Gassal Simulaton – Preparation for the Final Journey!

Genre: Simulation | Realistic | Spiritual Experience
Platform: PC (Steam)
Mode: Single Player

🕊️ A Silent Duty, A Profound Experience

Death is the most inevitable truth of life. Gassal Simulaton invites you to take part in this sacred duty. As a gassal, you will respectfully prepare the deceased for their final journey and experience this spiritual process in the most realistic way.

From the morgue to the cemetery, manage every step with patience, care, and deep contemplation. In the silence, you will work alone, feeling the weight and significance of each action.

🎮 Gameplay Mechanics

🔹 Step by Step – The Final Farewell

✔ Preparation: Organize your inventory, gather the necessary materials, and create a respectful environment.
✔ Morgue Procedures: Verify the identity of the deceased and carefully follow the proper procedures.
✔ Washing Process: Adjust the water temperature, wash, rinse, and complete the cleansing with rose water.
✔ Shrouding: Wrap the deceased according to religious and cultural customs.
✔ Placing in the Coffin: Handle with care and ensure everything is properly arranged.
✔ Burial Process: Dig the grave, lower the coffin, and complete the burial with respect.

This journey requires no haste, no negligence, and no disrespect—only patience, precision, and reverence.

🌍 A Deeply Immersive Atmosphere

🔹 Meticulously designed locations such as the morgue, washing area, and cemetery.
🔹 Fully interactive objects: Water, soap, shroud, coffin, shovel, and other burial tools.
🔹 Weather & Lighting Effects: Misty mornings, twilight shadows, and dynamic lighting enhance the solemn atmosphere.

🎵 Sound & Spiritual Immersion

🔊 An auditory experience designed for deep reflection and mindfulness.

✔ Realistic ambient sounds: Flowing water, soft winds, distant birds, and footsteps.
✔ Subtle, atmospheric background music to support the spiritual experience.
✔ Complete Silence Mode: Play with no sound at all and focus solely on the moment.

🕯️ In Silence, With Respect, The Final Duty

This is not just a game—it’s a journey. A unique simulation that reminds us of life’s impermanence and invites deep contemplation.

Are you ready to fulfill your final duty?
